narrative:
Freeport Twp/Vil (precinct in Harrison County) has 480 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.6%, a clear Republican lean of 8.8 percentage points.
